title: GodArmour
description: The plugin from ManePear's GodArmor video
body:
**If you need support, please say so in the discord!**
 
[![Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/16684009ebeec99f6558120d6fae93d4a01eaf7e.png)](https://discord.gg/xT5Drv84ab)

[![Craftlands](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1456750543254061199/1457164304016085246/CREATE_SERVER_6.png?ex=695b0182&is=6959b002&hm=a2cb2f7c066a0720fb2c2c4731c303fe0ba9aabc6e13418454c31a8482656f0b&)](https://portal.craftlands.host/aff.php?aff=137)

<iframe width="53.3333333333" height="26.25" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/a8FciLdbkXA" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Features:

Helmet: Increased break speed, break any block with ease

Chestplate: Increased attack speed, can instantly hit

Leggings: Increased walk speed, equivalent to speed II

Boots: Increased health, grants 20 hearts

## How to obtain:

The armor is obtained by admins through the command **/armours** which opens a gui of all the armour. Admins should give these out in events
